case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. DALONG LUO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100029802) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LUO, DALONG

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LUO, DALONG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-06-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-31-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62141433)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-31-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
